summary: Independent read-only QA accepts the R2 repair for M7-SCENARIO-PERSON-EVENT-FILL-001. The prior runtime-boundary finding is fixed: mutated M7 runtime packs with LOCK_CANDIDATE review state, missing violenceCostRecord, empty high-risk violence-cost arrays, or unblocked high-risk review states are rejected by runtime parsing. The R2 parser now deep-validates and parses runtime M7 source, claim, localization, title, person, event, scenario, hook, choice, known-gap, reference, ordering, and manifest-count fields instead of accepting cast arrays. The repair stays inside content-runtime/tests plus process handoff metadata and does not create formal content lock acceptance, UI, sim-core, save migration, telemetry, server/multiplayer, release, or manual node battle scope.

tests_run.result: Read required project status. It preserves M6_GATE = PASS_WITH_LIMITS and DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE for M7.

Before QA R2 handoff creation: on content/m7-scenario-person-event-fill; dirty tracked files were allowed lead route/process metadata; untracked route evidence was present; known unrelated docs/M7_UI_Localization_Art_Handoff_Prompts.md remained untouched.

tests_run.command: git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD; git rev-parse HEAD; git merge-base origin/main HEAD

tests_run.result: R2 fix commit 7c5005c9 modifies packages/content-runtime/src/m7-beta-scenario.ts and tests/content-runtime-pack.test.ts; R2 handoff commit 1e8edbae adds the writer R2 review handoff.

Changed files are within allowed content-source, apps/content-tools, packages/content-schema, packages/content-runtime, tests, task, message, route, goal-mode, model-routing, and thread-registry paths.

tests_run.command: git diff --name-only origin/main...HEAD -- forbidden path set
tests_run.result: No forbidden path output for apps/web, apps/desktop, apps/sim-runner, packages/sim-core, packages/sim-ai, packages/save-format, packages/client-core, packages/map-renderer, packages/ui, packages/platform, tools, .github, prior gate docs, roadmap/risk/acceptance docs, PROJECT_STATUS.md, MANIFEST.md, SHA256SUMS.txt, or VALIDATION_REPORT.md.
R2 route/task shape ok; task REVIEW; DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE preserved; R2 review_commit and review_head_commit match route evidence.

tests_run.command: node --experimental-strip-types --input-type=module -e mutated runtime parser probe for LOCK_CANDIDATE/null violenceCostRecord/empty arrays/unblocked high-risk states
tests_run.result: All eight mutated runtime cases were rejected: LOCK_CANDIDATE, null violenceCostRecord, empty victimGroups/sourceRegions/immediateCosts/longTermConsequences, unblocked high-risk event reviewState, and unblocked violenceCostRecord reviewState.

tests_run.command: node --experimental-strip-types --input-type=module -e runtime parser deep-validation probe for bad source class, label, research status, review state, references, ordering, and manifest count
tests_run.result: All nine mutated runtime cases were rejected: bad sourceClass, bad claim label, bad researchStatus, bad localization reviewState, bad title reference, bad choice localization reference, bad scenario event reference, unstable event order, and manifest eventCount mismatch.

tests_run.command: rg runtime/scope boundary scan over R2 changed surfaces and route/task text
tests_run.result: Matches were expected constraint or guard text: LOCK_CANDIDATE rejection, PASS_WITH_LIMITS, DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE, no WorldState index exposure, and task/route forbidden-scope wording. No product-code drift into UI, sim-core, save, telemetry, server/multiplayer, release, or manual node battle was found.
Content validation passed for M1 hash 4a438525, M2 hash 9ab72b0b, M3 hash 76b75849, M6 map hash 4485a353, M6 scenario hash 6d1f6d64, and M7 beta scenario/person/event set hash 92aed91e.
1 test file passed; 16 tests passed, including the R2 runtime negative tests.
format:check, lint, recursive typecheck, and architecture:check passed; architecture self-test produced 15 expected violations.

decisions: ACCEPT: the previous QA REQUEST_CHANGES finding is fixed. Runtime parsing now rejects the reproduced LOCK_CANDIDATE and missing/empty high-risk violence-cost mutations.

ACCEPT: runtime parser now deep-validates enough of the M7 record graph to preserve source labels, source classes, research status, review states, blocked high-risk Human Gate states, reference closure, deterministic order, and manifest counts.

ACCEPT: R2 changed only packages/content-runtime/src/m7-beta-scenario.ts, tests/content-runtime-pack.test.ts, and R2 handoff metadata; no UI, sim-core, save migration, telemetry, server/multiplayer, release, formal content lock acceptance, or manual node battle scope was added.
ACCEPT: M6 PASS_WITH_LIMITS and DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE remain preserved in task, route, runtime pack root, tests, and handoff evidence.
risks: The high-risk event classifier remains intentionally term-based over eventId/triggerKey. It covers the current coercion/forced/famine/violence R2 scope and should be extended if future content introduces additional high-risk taxonomy terms.
Formal content lock acceptance remains a separate future Human Gate; this ACCEPT only covers the M7 scenario/person/event fill path and R2 runtime parser repair.
requested_action: Lead orchestrator may validate this QA R2 handoff, integrate/close M7-SCENARIO-PERSON-EVENT-FILL-001 if gates remain clean, and preserve formal content lock as a future Human Gate.
